name: My Daily Download
description: Personalized daily email briefing of AI news, tools, and tactics, curated per career vertical and seniority level. Every item cites a real source. Now part of My AI Skill Tutor (myaiskilltutor.com).

allowed_actions: Follow primary CTAs tagged with data-agent-action to the external My AI Skill Tutor assessment
Use the career preview selector on the home and sample pages
Execute the one-click unsubscribe flow (/api/unsubscribe?token=...) only with a token from the user's own email and explicit user instruction
disallowed_actions: Purchases, upgrades, or any payment action (no checkout exists on this site)
Account creation or sign-in on a user's behalf without explicit user instruction
Calling internal /api/* routes other than the documented unsubscribe flow
Submitting or modifying subscriber profile data at /onboarding without explicit user instruction
guardrails.notes: Subscription cancellation is handled via support@mydailydownload.com or the one-click unsubscribe link in every email; there is no self-serve cancel button on the site.
